languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

languages.text: "Ты пытаешься выдать разрушение Музеона и порчу моей коллекции за мое собственное пожелание?" {n}Тразин переходит на шипение.{/n} "Твои убогие попытки шутить не идут на пользу твоему грядущему".

traits.locale_text: "Ты пытаешься выдать разрушение Музеона и порчу моей коллекции за мое собственное пожелание?" {n}Тразин переходит на шипение.{/n} "Твои убогие попытки шутить не идут на пользу твоему грядущему".
traits.speaker: EX_Trazyn

traits.locale_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

"Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

"Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

languages.text: «¿Insinúas que habéis destruido el Museion y profanado mi colección porque yo lo solicité?». {n}La voz de Trazyn se convierte en un bufido:{/n} «Ese patético remedo de burla te saldrá muy caro».
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: «¿Insinúas que habéis destruido el Museion y profanado mi colección porque yo lo solicité?». {n}La voz de Trazyn se convierte en un bufido:{/n} «Ese patético remedo de burla te saldrá muy caro».

languages.text: “你的意思是，陈列馆被摧毁、我的收藏被掠夺，都是我自找的？”{n}特拉金的声音压低，变成嘶哑的低语：{/n}“你这可悲的幽默感，对你可没半点好处。”
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: “你的意思是，陈列馆被摧毁、我的收藏被掠夺，都是我自找的？”{n}特拉金的声音压低，变成嘶哑的低语：{/n}“你这可悲的幽默感，对你可没半点好处。”

languages.text: « Insinuez-vous que je souhaitais voir mon Muséion détruit et ma collection, pillée ? {n}demande-t-il, puis il continue dans un murmure sifflant.{/n} Vos misérables tentatives d'humour ne vous apporteront rien de bien. »
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: « Insinuez-vous que je souhaitais voir mon Muséion détruit et ma collection, pillée ? {n}demande-t-il, puis il continue dans un murmure sifflant.{/n} Vos misérables tentatives d'humour ne vous apporteront rien de bien. »

languages.text: "Museion'un yok edilmesinin ve koleksiyonumun yağmalanmasının isteğim doğrultusunda gerçekleştiğini mi iddia ediyorsun?" {n}Trazyn'in sesi tıslamaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Acınası mizahi çabaların işe yaramayacak."
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: "Museion'un yok edilmesinin ve koleksiyonumun yağmalanmasının isteğim doğrultusunda gerçekleştiğini mi iddia ediyorsun?" {n}Trazyn'in sesi tıslamaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Acınası mizahi çabaların işe yaramayacak."

languages.text: "Willst du damit behaupten, die Zerstörung des Museions und die Plünderung meiner Sammlung wäre auf mein Geheiß erfolgt?" {n}Trazyns Stimme wird zu einem Zischen:{/n} "Deine armseligen Versuche, witzig zu sein, werden dir nicht gut bekommen."
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: "Willst du damit behaupten, die Zerstörung des Museions und die Plünderung meiner Sammlung wäre auf mein Geheiß erfolgt? {n}Trazyns Stimme wird zu einem Zischen:{/n} "Deine armseligen Versuche, witzig zu sein, werden dir nicht gut bekommen."

languages.text: 「ミュゼイオンの破壊と私のコレクションの略奪は、私の依頼によるのですか？」{n}トラズンの声がヒソヒソと低くなる:{/n}「あなたの哀れなユーモアは、あなたにとって良い結果をもたらさないでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."

traits.locale_text: 「ミュゼイオンの破壊と私のコレクションの略奪は、私の依頼によるのですか？」{n}トラズンの声がヒソヒソと低くなる:{/n}「あなたの哀れなユーモアは、あなたにとって良い結果をもたらさないでしょう。」
